scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev -w @collab-board/backend" "npm run dev -w @collab-board/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @collab-board/backend && npm run build -w @collab-board/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @collab-board/backend && npm run lint -w @collab-board/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @collab-board/backend && npm run test -w @collab-board/frontend
